Decision_Rules: Assign material here when the main focus is media coverage, messaging, narrative framing, public perception, or communicative strategy around politics. Use this theme for discourse and circulation rather than the underlying policy or institutional event itself.
Representative_Examples: "These posts collectively depict a narrative of backlash against Trump supporters..."; "President-elect Donald Trump has nominated Kari Lake to lead the Voice of America, raising concerns about the politicization of U.S. global media and the erosion of journalistic independence."

Theme_Name: Legal Accountability, Courts, and Constitutional Conflict

Representative_Examples: "Rep. Al Green has announced articles of impeachment against President Trump... The move is framed as a moral and constitutional response to what critics call dangerous and illegal policy threats."; "Posts detail President Trump's dismissal of Archivist Colleen Shogan...
